sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n95380" key="skutorra/fos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σκῡτο-ρράφος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾰ], <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, </foreign>(<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ῥάπτω</etym>) <sense id="n95380.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">shoemaker</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">leather-worker</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:47:17:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">47.17.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
